meaning: vt.打(谷),(用棍、鞭等)痛打,打败,使逆行,胜过,使颠簸,推敲vi.打谷,击,颠簸,逆行n.打谷,逆风浪行进
examples: Shall we thrash him? He is the son
He became angry and began to thrash a servant.
This encourages stability within the iteration by reducing "thrash".
The manager will thrash things out and we will get things off our chest.
Estrada has offered to meet former presidents Aquino and Ramos to thrash out differences.
